7.title: Jurisdiction
7.text: All Courts and Judicial Authorities within Nepal

about.intro: Apeksha Neupane is a licensed Advocate engaged in civil, criminal, and commercial litigation, legal consultation, legal drafting, legal advisory, and legal research. With a commitment to analytical excellence and practical legal solutions, professional interests extend to constitutional, commercial, corporate, and tax law, alongside human rights and women's rights. Every matter is approached with integrity, professionalism, and a steadfast dedication to protecting clients' interests.
about.testimonials-intro: committed to delivering practical legal solutions, responsive service, and professional representation in every matter.

1.title: Court Marriage
1.description: Complete legal assistance for court marriage, from consultation and document preparation to registration, with guidance at every step. Services are available for marriages between Nepali citizens, a Nepali citizen and a foreign national, and between foreign nationals under Nepalese law.

2.title: Divorce
2.description: legal assistance for mutual divorce, contested divorce, and ex parte (one-sided) divorce proceedings where permitted by law. Services include legal consultation, document preparation, court representation, settlement negotiations, child custody, alimony, property division, and guidance throughout every stage of the legal process.

3.title: Family Law
3.description: Legal assistance in property partition, inheritance, succession, divorce, child custody, alimony, adoption, guardianship, and other family law matters, with end-to-end legal guidance and representation.

4.title: All Corporate services including Company Registration & OCR Compliance
4.description: Legal assistance for company incorporation, foreign investment approvals, OCR registration, annual returns, share transfers, capital changes, amendments to company documents, board and shareholder resolutions, mergers, company liquidation, and all Office of the Company Registrar (OCR) compliance requirements.

services.intro: From civil, criminal, and corporate law to constitutional, commercial, tax, and regulatory matters, comprehensive legal services are provided with a strategic, client-focused approach. Every matter is handled with precision, professionalism, and a commitment to delivering practical, effective, and results-oriented legal solutions tailored to the unique needs of individuals, businesses, and organizations.
